CustomField.description: When enabled, every API call (inbound and outbound) is disabled for the applicable user, profile, or org. This is a hierarchical custom setting — user-level overrides profile-level, which overrides org-level.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Check to disable ALL API calls (inbound and outbound). Applies at user, profile, or org level based on where the setting is configured.
CustomField.label: Disable All APIs
